title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Geodis India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Geodis India
jsonLd.description:
Geodis India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Geodis India:
Geodis India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Geodis India!
